meta.description: Split the bill from a receipt photo, decide with group games, and let AI plan your outing. Free, with privacy by design.

home.kicker: The app for when you meet up
home.subtitle: Split the bill in seconds, decide who pays with quick games, and let AI build a plan with real places near you.

divide.name: Divide
divide.description: Receipt photo or manual entry, four split modes, and a ready-to-share message with who pays whom.

decide.name: Decide
decide.description: Roulette, cards, simultaneous touch and AI quizzes. Let luck (or knowledge) decide for you.

plan.name: Plan
plan.description: Tell us where you are, how many you are and how long you have: AI suggests a plan with real places.

privacy.title: Your privacy comes first
privacy.text: We don't store receipts, amounts, locations or game results. Everything is computed on your device and discarded afterwards.

modulePages.intro: This module arrives in an upcoming increment. Here's what it will include:

divide.name: Divide
divide.lead: The bill calculator for groups: from the receipt to "who pays whom" without arguments.

ocr.title: Receipt photo
ocr.desc: AI-powered OCR that extracts items, quantities and totals into an editable table.

manual.title: Manual entry
manual.desc: Add items and prices by hand in seconds, no photo needed.

modes.title: Four split modes
modes.desc: Equal parts, by consumption, custom percentages, or a fixed extra for someone.

share.title: Shareable result
share.desc: A formatted message for WhatsApp with each amount and everyone's payment link.

decide.name: Decide
decide.lead: Fast, visual games to settle anything as a group, designed for your phone.

roulette.title: Roulette
roulette.desc: Spins with realistic physics and celebrates the chosen one with confetti.

cards.title: Cards
cards.desc: Everyone flips a card from the deck; one is marked.

touch.title: Simultaneous touch
touch.desc: Everyone puts a finger on the screen and the app picks one after the countdown.

groupQuiz.title: Who here…?
groupQuiz.desc: Questions to vote among yourselves and laugh at the result.

trivia.title: AI trivia
trivia.desc: Questions on any topic and level you choose, from Easy to Impossible. Works even offline.

plan.name: Plan
plan.lead: A tailored plan with real places in your area, generated by AI.

location.title: Your area
location.desc: Use your location with explicit permission, or type a city.

prefs.title: Made to measure
prefs.desc: People, plan type, budget and available time.

ai.title: AI narrative plan
ai.desc: One to three real stops, with the why and the ideal order.

directions.title: Directions
directions.desc: Opens the route directly in your favorite maps app.

footer.privacy: Privacy by design: your data is not stored.
footer.rights: Open source under the MIT license.
